Enterprise Solutions
v2.0.0

Enterprise Solutions

DMS §8 · Solution Registry (registry/solution.yaml)
The minimum acceptable delivery unit (P3 Solution-first). Each solution packages Applications, Capabilities, Knowledge, Workflows, Policies, Configurations and Templates into one installable, versioned whole.

// Solution Registry

All solutions are signed by their publisher (ed25519-jws) and verified on install. The AC Sales Coach solution is highlighted as the flagship coaching offering.

AEAOS v2.0.0 — Enterprise AI Agent Operating System
Understand. Decide. Execute. Evolve.
